raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "AB 398 would establish a $300 minimum tax credit benefit for tax filers eligible for the California Earned Income Tax Credit (CalEITC).",
    "The CalEITC currently ranges from $1 to $3,644.",
    "The CalEITC is a refundable tax credit that benefits Californians earning less than $31,950 a year.",
    "Currently, 81% of eligible tax filers receive less than $300 from the CalEITC.",
    "Establishing a minimum credit of $300 would more meaningfully help Californian’s working poor that are struggling to make ends meet.",
    "Increasing the CalEITC minimum would encourage workers to file their taxes.",
    "Not filing taxes results in billions of dollars in federal funding going unclaimed in California.",
    "The CalEITC delivers $1.4 billion to Californians with low incomes annually."
  ]
}
```
